results.title: Satheesan Govt scraps Silver Line land acquisition, withdraws cases against protesters
results.description: Thiruvananthapuram, May 20 (IANS) In one of the most politically significant decisions taken within days of assuming office, the Cabinet led by Chief Minister, V.D. Satheesan, on Wednesday formally moved to dismantle the controversial Silver Line semi high-speed rail project, announcing the cancellation of all land acquisition notifications issued for the project across Kerala. results.title: Artists, poets of Loren Legarda's Kislap Diwa project cut ties with senator
results.description: The artists and poets of a project spearheaded by Loren Legarda have severed their ties with the senator, saying her recent political actions no longer reflect the values they uphold.
